notes.title: Black powder on canvas 01
notes.memoryDetails: (C) Playing With Fire (D) ~2018 (des) I wonder what would happen if I dumped some black powder on a canvas and lit it on fire.

notes.title: Burnt wood 01
notes.memoryDetails: (C) Playing With Fire (D) ~2018 (des) What designs can I make by heating random metal pieces red-hot with a blowtorch?
